response.overview: A heartfelt portrait of a four-generation family whose corner shop has been a cornerstone of their North London community since 1979. As they embark on a new challenge, we follow matriarch Anju’s pursuit of a long-held dream. Through moments of humour, warmth, and intimate reflection, HOMEMADE captures the enduring power of family and community life in modern London.
response.tagline: THIS IS WHAT MADE US. THIS IS WHAT FEEDS US.
response.title: HOMEMADE
